title: rosa canina var. fissidens
intro: Rosa canina var. fissidens, also known as the fragrant or prickly rose, is a variety of the wild rose plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. fissidens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate a range of health complaints.
